---
title: "KMER"
output: html_document
date: "2026-03-09"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(scales)
```

```{r}
source("functions.R")
```


```{r}
numReads = 27000000
kmerDir = "../output/plotting_data/quality/dna/KMER/"
plotsDir = paste0(gridsearchDir, "plots/")
extType = ".jpg"


```

```{r}
k2Map =  {}

for(k in seq(from = 12, to = 30, by = 5)){
  kmer = read_tsv(paste0(kmerDir, "k_", k,".txt")) %>% mutate(geneSetSize = str_count(gene, ","))
  k2Map[k] = list(kmer)
}

```
